attacking_style: Does not typically initiate attacks; operates as a defensive climber who responds to others' moves and survives steep gradient finishes through steady pacing rather than explosive accelerations.
team_tactics: Functions as protected rider with elite domestiques (Vingegaard/Roglič) setting tempo and controlling threats in closing kilometers; benefits from team's willingness to control race rather than needing to create own opportunities.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient mountain finishes where pure climbing strength matters more than explosive power; struggles when required to produce own accelerations or ride independently without team support.
vulnerability: Fragile margins when isolated from teammates; unable to match attacks when domestiques are unavailable; lacks ability to distance rivals through own offensive moves, relying instead on defensive survival.
key_patterns: Requires elite teammates pacing in final kilometers rather than own offensive legs (2 observations)
Shows hidden climbing strength on steep gradients beyond traditional domestique role (2 observations)
Operates defensively rather than offensively, surviving attacks versus initiating them (2 observations)
Small winning margins indicate vulnerability when forced to race independently (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: showed consistent climbing ability across 2020-2023 but 17-second margin in 2023 reveals ongoing dependence on team support
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 18
